description: citrixonline.com is associated with GoTo/Citrix Online collaboration services. Its public developer offerings documented here cover meeting management and SCIM-based identity provisioning for GoTo accounts and organizations.
summary: citrixonline.com exposes two documented developer HTTP APIs under the GoTo platform for this domain: the GoToMeeting REST API and the SCIM user/group management API, both authenticated with GoTo OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens obtained from a registered OAuth client.
